subcommands.name: ls
subcommands.description: Get all available teams for the current user

subcommands.name: ls:user
subcommands.description: Get all users for a given team

subcommands.name: add:user
subcommands.description: Add a new user to a team

subcommands.name: remove:user
subcommands.description: Remove a user from a team

subcommands.name: deploy
subcommands.description: Push your locally compiled completion specs to Fig's server based on the mapping defined in the .fig/manifest file

subcommands.name: manifest
subcommands.description: Create or update the .fig/manifest file. Use this command to link your locally created completion specs to your team

subcommands.name: whoami
subcommands.description: Get information about the current user and their associated teams
